title: rustdoc
html:
rustdoc

File Read

Context: sudo, unprivileged

rustdoc /path/to/input-file

File Write

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo '//! DATA' >/path/to/temp-file
rustdoc /path/to/temp-file -o /path/to/output-dir/
excerpt: rustdoc File Read Context: sudo, unprivileged rustdoc /path/to/input-file File Write Context: sudo, unprivileged echo '//! DATA' >/path/to/temp-file rustdoc /path/to/temp-file -o /path/to
